models.name: Bird
models.doc: This is base model for polymorphic single level inheritance with a discriminator.

seagull.name: SeaGull
seagull.doc: The second level model in polymorphic single level inheritance.

sparrow.name: Sparrow
sparrow.doc: The second level model in polymorphic single level inheritance.

goose.name: Goose
goose.doc: The second level model in polymorphic single level inheritance.

eagle.name: Eagle
eagle.doc: The second level model in polymorphic single levels inheritance which contains references to other polymorphic instances.

models.name: Dinosaur
models.doc: Define a base class in the legacy way. Discriminator property is not explicitly defined in the model.

t-rex.name: TRex
t-rex.doc: The second level legacy model in polymorphic single level inheritance.

models.name: Fish
models.doc: A discriminated model with no defined subtypes. The discriminator is declared but no models extend it.
